name: Typeform MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Typeform — enabling AI agents to interact with Typeform forms and response data. Allows agents to retrieve form definitions, access survey responses, query form analytics, and manage Typeform workspaces. Enables AI-driven analysis of form and survey data.
use_cases: Retrieving and analyzing Typeform survey responses from data analysis agents
Querying form submission data for customer feedback analysis agents
Managing Typeform workspaces and forms from content management agents
Building AI workflows that process survey data as part of customer intelligence pipelines
not_for: Real-time form submission handling (use webhooks for that)
Creating complex conditional forms programmatically (form builder is visual-first)
best_when: A team using Typeform for surveys, feedback collection, or onboarding forms wants AI agents to analyze responses, identify patterns, and automate downstream workflows based on form data.
avoid_when: You need to create complex dynamic forms via API. Typeform's creation API has limitations compared to the visual builder. Also: survey response data may contain sensitive personal information.

auth.notes: Typeform Personal Access Token or OAuth 2.0. Personal tokens for individual use. OAuth for multi-user integrations. Read-only tokens for response analysis.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Typeform Free: 10 responses/mo; API access on paid plans
pricing.notes: Typeform API access requires paid plan. Free plan is very limited. Community MCP server is free open source.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Survey responses may contain sensitive personal or health information
Response data is paginated — large survey datasets require multiple API calls
Response analysis at scale may approach rate limits
Paid plan required for meaningful API access — free tier severely limited
Typeform API doesn't support real-time response streaming — use webhooks for new responses
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Survey responses may contain sensitive personal data, health info, or opinions. GDPR compliance for EU respondents. OAuth minimal scopes. SOC2 certified.

security_score_components.security_notes: Survey response data may include sensitive personal information. GDPR compliance required for EU respondents. SOC2 certified. OAuth with minimal scopes.
